name: @kmos/connector-framework
description: KMOS Connector Framework (WP-17; KMOS-0180 §22 External Connectors, KMOS-0170 Connector contributions). A ConnectorHost that governs External Connectors: each connector is a first-class canonical Identity (kind 'Connector', never anonymous) and translates EXTERNAL protocols into CANONICAL objects + events. Connectors are translation adapters only — business logic stays in capabilities and connectors never bypass the platform (they reach the Asset Registry through canonical APIs and publish canonical events).
